package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for route_groups_created_inside_handlers: Code that constructs or mutates route groups outside the startup router layer.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule149NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule149NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule149NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario149Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule149NegativeService, input Rule149NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
